# create-badge

Use this skill for creating new badge definitions.

## Verified notes

- `cargo run --bin gnostr -- create-badge --help` shows the live flags.
- `gnostr -V` should be checked when behavior differs across environments.

## Common commands

```bash
cargo run --bin gnostr -- create-badge --help
gnostr create-badge --help
```

## Rules

- Keep badge metadata explicit.
